name: @firegrid/log
description: Fable-native Firegrid bindings for S2 durable streams.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Log.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/log diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/log lint is covered by F# compile'
